title: Senior Frontend Developer at Docplexus Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Docplexus Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Join the Docplexus Digital Technologies family as a Frontend Developer in Vijayawada. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Docplexus Digital Technologies:
Docplexus Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Docplexus Digital Technologies!
